name: red_showy_exp01
description: Binary red/orange/maroon showy-flower classifier — exp01. Bottlebrush and Sausage tree moved to negative: Bottlebrush flowers are small spikes often below canopy resolution; Sausage tree flowers are large but hang below the canopy.
notes: Only 3 high-confidence positives (Gulmohar, Palash, Semal). Very underpowered — treat as exploratory only.
